data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Simple cancellation (24-hour notice)', but the evidence does not confirm that the system allows for cancellations with a 24-hour notice. While the linked use case mentions that cancellations more than 24 hours ahead result in an automatic refund, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality of this cancellation policy in practice. Therefore, this indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the cancellation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the cancellation policy allowing for cancellations with a 24-hour notice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
